articles.title: Ask the remodeler: Is layered the new recessed lighting?
articles.description:
Homeowners are looking for more out of their lighting these days, and a layered plan is in vogue. Here’s what that means.

The post Ask the remodeler: Is layered the new recessed lighting? appeared first on Boston.com.
